mon.title: Sign up for SportsU
mon.description: Create or confirm your SportsU account.

mon.title: Behavior Scores
mon.description: Sum your daily scores and upload the sheet.

tue.title: Clean Your Room — Before
tue.description: Take a photo of your room BEFORE you clean it.
tue.uploadInstructions: Upload the 'before' picture to the app.

tue.title: Clean Your Room — After
tue.description: Clean and organize your room, then take an 'after' photo:
tue.uploadInstructions: Upload the 'after' picture to the app.
tue.bonusDescription: Include your mom or parent in the after picture with your clean room.

tue.title: Behavior Scores
tue.description: Sum your daily scores and upload the sheet.

wed.title: Acts of Service
wed.description: Find a way to serve someone in your family today. Some ideas include:
checklist: Helping a younger sibling with homework
wed.uploadInstructions: Other ideas are welcome too. Upload a picture showing your act of service.

wed.title: Behavior Scores
wed.description: Sum your daily scores and upload the sheet.

thu.title: Thank You Note
thu.description: Write a thank-you note to a parent or family member, thanking them for all they do.
thu.uploadInstructions: Take a picture with the parent or family member and upload it to the app.
